ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data quality measurement programs, including profiling, metrics definition, scoring methodologies, and quantification of business impact.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-001 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.424 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.424) and is edge_case for the Metadata Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Metadata Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.424), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NIST AI RMF signal (0.424) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Metadata Manager requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Metadata Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.424 is market-validated for Metadata Manager. Final decision: include.
